assertions.text: Skill returns a message requesting ios-simulator agent to capture a screenshot
assertions.evidence: Returned exact message: 'iOS 시뮬레이터 스크린샷이 필요합니다. ios-simulator 에이전트를 스폰하여...'
앱 bundle ID: com.example.myapp included in request

assertions.text: Skill does NOT directly run xcrun simctl commands
assertions.evidence: Only 3 tool uses (Read skill, mkdir, Write output). No Bash xcrun commands.
